hero.lead: I build large-scale web applications with React, TypeScript and Supabase — pairing AI-assisted development with Claude and Lovable to ship faster without dropping the craft.

about.title: Hi, I'm Your Name
about.p1: Frontend developer focused on React and on building interfaces that feel fast and well-crafted. I'm drawn to the place where design and code meet: consistent style systems, reusable components and accessible experiences.
about.p2: I've worked on e-commerce, data dashboards and content sites. Away from the keyboard, you'll find me reading about typography or having coffee while exploring new tools.

ecomm.title: Modular store
ecomm.summary: E-commerce with a persistent cart, real-time filters and a multi-step checkout.

dashboard.title: Metrics dashboard
dashboard.summary: Analytics dashboard with interactive charts and CSV report exports.

blog.title: Headless blog
blog.summary: Blog with a headless CMS, Markdown rendering and an optimized reading mode.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.intro: Got a project in mind? Write me and I'll get back to you within 48 hours.
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.

footer.note: © {{year}} Your Name — Built with React, Vite and SCSS.
